nasb.text: Throwing him into convulsions, the unclean spirit cried out with a loud voice and came out of him.

esv.text: And the unclean spirit, convulsing him and crying out with a loud voice, came out of him.

cnv.text: 污靈使那人抽瘋，大聲喊叫，就從他身上出來了。

ccb.text: 污鬼使那人抽搐了一阵，大叫一声，就出来了。

csbs.text: 污灵使那个人抽疯，然后大声喊叫着从他里面出来了。
